if.test: searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != '' and searchCondition != null and searchCondition != ''

choose.otherwise: AND (MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR COMPANY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT m.MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME as MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.REGION, m.MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BUSINESS_NUMBER, m.CEO_NAME, m.CONTACT_NUMBER, m.MANAGER_NAME, m.MANAGER_CONTACT, m.CREDIT_LIMIT, m.MEAT_MONEY, m.MEMBER_GRADE, mg.DETAIL_CODE_NAME as MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME as STATUS_NAME, m.JOIN_DATE FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE = mt.DETAIL_CODE AND mt.GROUP_CODE = '003' AND mt.CODE = '003001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mg ON m.MEMBER_GRADE = mg.DETAIL_CODE AND mg.GROUP_CODE = '005' AND mg.CODE = '005001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.STATUS = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '004' AND st.CODE = '004001'
ORDER BY m.JOIN_DATE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER ( MEMBER_TYPE, REGION, MEMBER_ID, LOGIN_PW, COMPANY_NAME, BUSINESS_NUMBER, CEO_NAME, CONTACT_NUMBER, EMAIL,
COMPANY_PHONE, POSTCODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, MANAGER_NAME, MANAGER_CONTACT, MANAGER_MOBILE, MANAGER_EMAIL, CREDIT_LIMIT, MEAT_MONEY, MEMBER_GRADE, STATUS, AGREE_MARKETING, AGREE_SMS, JOIN_DATE ) VALUES ( #{memberType}, #{region}, #{memberId}, #{loginPw}, #{companyName}, #{businessNumber}, #{ceoName}, #{contactNumber}, #{email},
#{companyPhone}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{managerName}, #{managerContact}, #{managerMobile}, #{managerEmail}, #{creditLimit, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{meatMoney, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{memberGrade}, #{status}, #{agreeMarketing}, #{agreeSms}, #{joinDate} )
